emails.subject: Charged twice this month?!
emails.summary: Hi, I just checked my bank statement and I was charged $49 twice on July 3rd.
emails.suggested_reply: Thanks for flagging this — I'm looking into your billing history now. Could you confirm the last 4 digits of the card and the invoice date so I can trace the charge? If anything was billed in error we'll correct it right away.

emails.subject: Requesting a refund for order #4471
emails.summary: Hello, I ordered the Pro plan last week but it turns out it doesn't have the export feature I needed.
emails.suggested_reply: Sorry this didn't work out. I've started the refund review on our side — could you confirm the order or invoice number? Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

emails.subject: URGENT: dashboard completely down
emails.summary: Our whole team cannot access the dashboard since about 7am.
emails.suggested_reply: Thanks for the report — we're treating this as a priority and investigating now. I'll follow up as soon as we've identified the cause. You can also watch our status page for live updates.

emails.subject: You folks are amazing
emails.summary: Just wanted to say thank you to your support team — Priya helped me migrate all my data last week and staye...
emails.suggested_reply: Thank you so much for the kind words — messages like this genuinely make our week. If there's ever anything we can improve, we're all ears.

emails.subject: You have been selected — act now
emails.suggested_reply: No reply recommended — flagged as spam.

emails.subject: Feature request: dark mode
emails.summary: Hi team, I use the app late at night and it would be great if you could please add a dark mode.
emails.suggested_reply: Thanks for the suggestion — I've passed it to our product team and added your vote to the request. We can't promise a timeline, but we'll let you know if it ships.

emails.subject: App crashes when uploading CSV over 10MB
emails.summary: Steps to reproduce: go to Imports, choose a CSV bigger than about 10MB, hit upload.
emails.suggested_reply: Thanks for the detailed report. I've logged this with our engineering team. Could you share what device/browser you're on and roughly when it last happened? That will help us reproduce it quickly.

emails.subject: How do I add a second user to my account?

emails.suggested_reply: Thanks for reaching out. Happy to help — I've included the most relevant details below, and if anything is still unclear just reply to this email.
